tasks.description: Purchase vegetables, fruits, milk, and other weekly essentials from the supermarket.
Complete a 30-minute workout including jogging, stretching, and light cardio exercises.
Sweep and mop the floors, dust the furniture, and organize all rooms before the weekend.
Clear electricity, water, and internet bills before the due date to avoid late fees.
Research destinations, book accommodation, and prepare a travel itinerary for the family trip.
